specFidelityNotes: Diff c1c4af7..b3427bb (#467). backfill_product_partition implements full P2-9-5 E2E: skip-if-complete, budget.record_attempt per page, A-34 1-day window (start_date_ge/end_date_lt), paginated fetch (default page_size 50), grain=product upserts with GMV/orders/customers/CTR/click_order_rate mapping via expand_analytics_product_list_item, mark_complete only after all pages, mark_failed on mid-pagination TikTokAPIError. Module docstring + MODULE.md explicitly defer Impressions/Views (no A-33). Four fixture pytest cover all ACs. Additive harness edits (slice-routing wave 2, EXECUTION checklist) support slice metadata — not contradictory to issue intent.

convention_notes.note: Product partition public API, A-34 window semantics, and Impressions/Views deferral documented.
ProductPerformanceResource Protocol enables fixture stub without live Partner HTTP — matches partition test pattern.
